case_title: EMERIC GOODMAN ASSOC. LIMITED PART. ALAN WOFSY VS. PHILIP DEL POZZO

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS APPEAL CALENDAR OF JAN-16-2002 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JAN.16,02 BY JUDGE PRO TEM GARY L. GRAY.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: RECOVER FROM APPELLANT EMERIC GOODMAN ASSOC. LIMITED PART. ALAN WOFSY $755.00 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $755.00, SEE SCANNED DOC NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT AND AFFIDAVIT OF MAILING FILED
APPEAL RECORD REMANDED TO SMALL CLAIMS DIVISION.

SMALL CLAIMS APPEAL CALENDAR OF JAN-16-2002 - SMALL CLAIMS APPEAL HEARD. PHILIP DEL POZZO, RESPONDENT APPEARING PRO PER. ALAN WOFSY REPRESENTING EMERIC GOODMAN ASSOC. APPEARING PRO PER. PARTIES SWORN AND EXAMINED. DOCUMENTARY EVIDENCE AND ORAL ARGUMENT PRESENTED. JUDGMENT IN FAVOR OF RESPONDENT PHILIP DEL POZZO. (SEE JUDGMENT). JUDGE PRO TEM: GARY L. GRAY; CLERK: ANNA REDIGONDA.
RECORD ON APPEAL FILED BY APPELLANT EMERIC GOODMAN ASSOC. LIMITED PART. ALAN WOFSY AS TO RESPONDENT DEL POZZO, PHILIP HEARING SET FOR JAN-16-2002 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 525
STIPULATION TO USE JUDGE PRO TEM AND ORDER FILED.
